summary: Phase 1 completed: proved timelineQuotMCS_root_time_eq establishing root time MCS identity. Phases 2-4 blocked on truth lemma infrastructure for countermodel construction.

review_reason: Phase 1 completed but Phases 2-4 blocked. The countermodel theorem requires truth lemma infrastructure (BFMCS modal saturation or forward-only truth lemma) that is not yet mechanized for TimelineQuot.
